mapper.update: UPDATE plant_info SET image_url = #{imageUrl} WHERE cntnts_no = #{cntntsNo}

UPDATE plant_info SET water_spring = #{waterSpring}, water_summer = #{waterSummer}, water_autumn = #{waterAutumn}, water_winter = #{waterWinter}, manage_level = #{manageLevel}, growth_info = #{growthInfo} WHERE cntnts_no = #{cntntsNo}
